title: turnera pinifolia
intro: Turnera pinifolia, also known as the Mexican prickly poppy, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Turnera pinifolia include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of Turnera pinifolia can be made into teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
